property.name: mandatoryModular
property.value: {'necroverse_by_bluehg': ['Necroverse', 'Special', False]}

property.name: recommendedModular
property.value: {'intergalactic_hazards_by_bluehg': ['Intergalactic Hazards', 'Encounter', True]}

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, Gorr the God Butcher activates against them.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Next you will learn how it feels to be butchered."

card.name: Gorr The God Butcher
card.property: When Revealed: Deal each player 1 facedown encounter card. Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, Gorr the God Butcher activates against them.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Next you will learn how it feels to be butchered."

card.name: Gorr The God Butcher
card.property: When Revealed: Advance the main scheme to stage 3A. Discard the top 5 cards of each player's deck. Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, Gorr the God Butcher activates against them.

card.name: Deicide
card.property: Contents: Gorr the God Butcher (I) and Gorr the God Butcher (II). (Gorr the God Butcher (II) and Gorr the God Butcher (III) instead for expert mode.) Gorr the God Butcher, Necroverse, and Standard encounter sets. One additional modular encounter set (recommended: Intergalactic Hazards). Setup: Set the Necroverse modular encounter set, the Necro-Raven Gestalt minion, the double-sided Godbomb environment, and all copies of Heroes' Labor and Stalking Berserker aside, out of play. Advance to stage 1B.

alternate.name: Deicide
alternate.property: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase, if the villain's stage number is 2 or 3, place 1 plan counter here. Then, if there are 3 or more plan counters here, advance to stage 2A. Forced Response: After Gorr the God Butcher defeats an ally, place 1 threat on this scheme.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Put the set-aside Godbomb environment into play. Shuffle 1 copy of the Heroes' Labor treachery into each player's deck. Advance to stage 2B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Gorr's plan is revealed. He's coerced a god of bombs to construct a massive bomb, and using the stolen power of time gods, he plans to detonate it. Across space, across all time, all gods will die.

alternate.name: Make Ready The Bomb
alternate.property: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase, place 1 [per_hero] timer counters on the Godbomb environment. Forced Response: After an enemy attacks and defeats an ally, place 1 timer counter on the Godbomb environment. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: Welcome To Darkness
card.property: When Revealed: If the Godbomb environment is in play, remove all timer counters from it and flip it to its All-Black Necroverse side. Otherwise, put the set-aside All-Black Necroverse environment into play. Shuffle the set-aside Necroverse modular encounter set into the encounter deck. Shuffle 1 copy of the Stalking Berserker minion into each player's deck.

property.name: Quote
property.value: The god who is not a god has given himself over entirely to the All-Black Necroblade.

alternate.name: Welcome To Darkness
alternate.property: Forced Response: After a player's deck runs out of cards, place 4 necro counters on the All-Black Necroverse environment. Hero Action: Discard 1 card from your hand at random → remove 1 necro counter from All-Black Necroverse. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

card.name: Godbomb
card.property: If there are 12 [per_hero] or more timer counters here, the players lose the game. Hero Action: Discard an ally you control → remove 1 timer counter from here.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Bleed for my blessed bomb."

alternate.name: All-black Necroverse
alternate.property: While All-Black Necroverse has the following number of necro counters: • 3[per_hero]: Gorr the God Butcher's attacks gain overkill. • 6[per_hero]: All [[Necroverse]] enemies get +1 ATK. • 9[per_hero]: All [[Necroverse]] enemies get +1 SCH. • 12[per_hero]: The players lose the game.

card.name: Necro-raven Gestalt

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Elite. Necroverse.

card.property: Guard. Patrol. Forced Interrupt: When Necro-Raven Gestalt would be defeated, instead of discarding it, set it aside, out of play instead.

card.name: Black Berserker
card.property: Patrol. [star] Black Berserker gets +X hit points, where X is the number of [[Necroverse]] attachments in play (to a maximum of 4).

property.name: Quote
property.value: "This is not my killer. This is his guard dog. His very strong guard dog."

card.name: Necro-raven
card.property:
Incite 1. Surge. Forced Response: After Necro-Raven enters play, discard the top card of your deck. Then, if there are 3 copies of Necro-Raven in play, discard them and summon the Necro-Raven Gestalt minion and put it into play engaged with you.
[star] Boost: Put Necro-Raven into play engaged with you.

card.name: Blighted Chains
card.property: Attach to your identity. As an additional cost to use a hero's basic power, you must discard 1 random card from your hand. Alter-Ego Action: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck → discard this card.

card.name: Mind-hewn Blade

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Necroverse. Weapon.

card.property: Attach to Gorr the God Butcher. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Gorr the God Butcher attacks you, discard the top 2 cards of your deck. This attack gains piercing. Hero Action: Take 2 indirect damage and discard the top 2 cards of your deck → discard this card.

card.name: Umbral Wings
card.property: Attach to Gorr the God Butcher. Forced Interrupt: When Gorr the God Butcher is dealt damage, reduce that damage by 1. Hero Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand and the top 2 cards of your deck → discard this card.

card.name: Vicious Tendrils

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Necroverse. Weapon.

card.property: Attach to Gorr the God Butcher. Gorr the God Butcher gains retaliate 1. [star] Gorr the God Butcher's attacks gain ranged. Hero Action: Discard 1 card at random from your hand and discard the top 4 cards of your deck → discard this card.

card.name: Anti-dogma
card.property:
When Revealed: Gorr the God Butcher schemes. Place 2 threat on the main scheme or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.
[star] Boost: Place 2 threat on the main scheme or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

card.name: Brutal Cunning
card.property: Peril. When Revealed: Choose one: • Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until you discard a [[Necroverse]] attachment. Reveal that card. • Shuffle the bottommost [[Necroverse]] attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. This card gains surge.

card.name: Gleeful Savagery
card.property:
When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Take 1 indirect damage. This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Gorr the God Butcher attacks you. Take 2 indirect damage or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.
[star] Boost: Take 2 indirect damage or discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

card.name: Forgotten Gods
card.property:
Forced Response: When the villain phase ends, deal each player 1 indirect damage.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Everywhere you go, you find the trail of deities' corpses that Gorr has left behind.

card.name: Nihilistic Vision
card.property: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded. Reveal that card. All [[Necroverse]] enemies (including Gorr the God Butcher) get +1 ATK.

property.name: Quote
property.value: On a backwoods planet, an alien boy looks up at the morning sky, and watches the sun turn black.

card.name: You Are My God
card.property: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Forced Response: After Gorr the God Butcher attacks, he attacks again. Deal him no boost cards for this attack. (Limit once per player per phase.)

property.name: Quote
property.value: Even if Gorr kills all the gods in creation, there will still be one god left standing.

card.name: Heroes' Labor
card.property: Incite 1. Forced Response: After you draw Heroes' Labor or discard it from the top of your deck, reveal it. When Revealed: Place 1 timer counter on the Godbomb environment, if able. Otherwise, place 1 necro counter on the All-Black Necroverse environment. Put this card into your discard pile (instead of discarding it to the encounter discard pile).

card.name: Stalking Berserker
card.property: Forced Response: After you draw Stalking Berserker or discard it from the top of your deck, reveal it. Forced Response: After your turn ends, discard the top 2 cards of your deck and place 1 necro counter on the All-Black Necroverse environment. When Defeated: Put this card into the engaged player's discard pile.

card.name: Shadow Serpent
card.property:
[star] Shadow Serpent's attacks gain overkill.
[star] Boost: Deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I feel them... drowning. Feel the blackness flooding them."

card.name: Annihilablade

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Necroverse. Weapon.

card.property: Attach to the villain. [star] Forced Interrupt: When the villain's attack would defeat an ally, remove that ally from the game instead of discarding it. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [mental] [energy] resources and discard the top 5 cards of your deck → discard this card.

card.name: Dark Apotheosis
card.property: Attach to the enemy with the most hit points remaining. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [mental] resources and discard the top 3 cards of your deck → discard this card.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Shuffle all minions in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a minion is discarded. Reveal that card.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Shuffle all attachments in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded. Reveal that card.

card.name: The Planet Cleaver
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When facedown encounter cards are dealt to players during the villain phase, deal each player 1 additional facedown encounter card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: The final doom of all gods is Gorr's weapon in its truest form. The Annihilablade hangs over us all.

card.name: Bounty Hunter
card.property: Patrol. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Bounty Hunter attacks, if you are confused, they get +2 ATK for this attack.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Your antagonist is well connected, but these hired guns won't stop you.

card.name: Solar Flare
card.property:
When Revealed: If you are confused, take 3 indirect damage. Otherwise, you are confused.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "That was close!" -Rocket Raccoon

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: You are confused. Then, choose an engaged minion, if able. That enemy attacks you.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I hate to say it, but I think we're lost." —Star-Lord

card.name: Asteroid Belt

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Location. Setting.

card.property: Uses (2 [per_hero] asteroid counters). Forced Response: After the end of the player phase, each player takes 2 indirect damage. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero → remove X asteroid counters from here, where X is the highest of your ATK, THW, or DEF.
